subcodes.first_line: O Zayn al-'Abidin! Render thou praise for that the gaze of God hath been directed unto thee and thy name hath flowed from this Pen which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین العابدین ان احمد بما توجه الیک طرف الله و جری اسمک من هذا القلم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
